basic_info.title: Lunar 2: Eternal Blue Complete
basic_info.review: A masterpiece of the JRPG genre, praised for its emotional storytelling, beautiful art style, and memorable soundtrack.

play_today.details: Definitive version with enhanced graphics, voice acting, and full English localization by Working Designs. Best experienced through modern emulators for optimal performance.

recommended_patches.name: Eternal Blue Complete Improved Translation Patch
recommended_patches.description: Community-driven patch that refines Working Designs' localization for greater accuracy and consistency

optimal_settings: Enable VSync
Set texture filtering to 'Bilinear'
Use 2x internal resolution for sharper visuals
Configure touchscreen buttons for combat actions
Enable 'Auto-save on pause'
Use 'Luminance' shader for better color accuracy

play_today.details: Official PSP port with downscaled visuals and missing soundtrack enhancements. Still playable but inferior to PS1 version due to resolution limitations.

optimal_settings: Use 'Auto' scaling mode for best aspect ratio
Enable 'Anisotropic Filtering'
Set internal resolution to 2x

play_today.details: Official mobile ports with simplified controls and compressed graphics. Not recommended due to inferior presentation compared to console versions.

The definitive modern experience via the Lunar Remastered Collection. Features native 4K resolution, 60 FPS performance, and widescreen support. Includes the complete PS1 version with all extra dungeons, voice acting, and the improved English localization by Working Designs. Offers cloud saves, modern controller support, and seamless accessibility for new players.

The classic definitive version for purists. This North American release features the complete Working Designs localization, which is widely considered the gold standard for Lunar games. It includes the extra dungeon and voice acting absent in the Sega CD original. While it lacks modern QoL features like save states or widescreen, it offers the authentic 1998 experience with the best soundtrack and cutscenes of the original generation.

recommended_patches.name: Lunar 2: Eternal Blue Unworked Patch
recommended_patches.description: A patch for the PlayStation version that restores the original Japanese game balance and content while retaining the Working Designs English translation, undoing significant changes made to the original release.

optimal_settings: Internal Resolution: 2x or 4x for sharp retro scaling
Enable NTSC mode for correct color timing
Texture Filtering: Bilinear for smooth sprite scaling
Audio: Enable SPU-X for enhanced sound quality
Touch Controls: Enable on-screen overlay with custom layout
Save States: Enable auto-save every 5 minutes
Internal Resolution: 2x for performance on mobile devices
Frame Limit: 60 FPS for smooth gameplay

play_today.details: The original Japanese release offers the most faithful experience to the Sega CD source material, featuring superior background animations and the original soundtrack arrangement. However, it lacks an official English localization, requiring a fan translation patch to be playable for English speakers. It is recommended only for collectors or those seeking the specific Saturn aesthetic, as the PS1 version is generally preferred for content and accessibility.

recommended_patches.name: Lunar 2: Eternal Blue Saturn English Translation Patch
recommended_patches.description: A fan translation patch for the Japanese Sega Saturn version that enables full English text and menus, fixing script dialog bugs, text display issues for items, and miscellaneous typos.

optimal_settings: BIOS: Load official Sega Saturn BIOS files (saturn_bios.zip)
Video: Enable high-resolution rendering (2x or 4x internal resolution)
Audio: Set sound chip to 'YMF292' for accurate audio emulation
Input: Configure controller mapping for modern gamepads
BIOS: Ensure Saturn BIOS files are in the correct directory
Video: Use OpenGL renderer for better performance
Audio: Enable sound emulation with low latency settings
Save States: Enable periodic auto-save for stability

description.synopsis: Set a thousand years after the events of the first game, Lunar 2: Eternal Blue Complete follows Hiro, a young man who discovers he is the reincarnation of the legendary hero Alex. As the world faces a new threat from the Moon, Hiro must gather a party of companions to prevent the destruction of the planet and uncover the truth about his own identity and the cycle of rebirth.
key_features: Full-motion video (FMV) cutscenes with high production value
Turn-based battle system with elemental magic and status effects
Comprehensive character customization via equipment and skill trees
Multiple endings determined by player choices and relationship levels
Extensive world map exploration with hidden dungeons and secrets
Orchestral soundtrack composed by Motoi Sakuraba
Anime-style character designs by Akira Toriyama
Remastered versions feature updated graphics and quality-of-life improvements
legacy_and_impact: Lunar 2: Eternal Blue Complete is widely regarded as one of the greatest JRPGs of the 32-bit era, setting a high bar for emotional storytelling in the genre. Its influence is evident in the 'Complete' series of remakes and its enduring popularity among retro gaming enthusiasts.
